title: Postpartum preeclampsia: risks after delivery
excerpt: Blood pressure can rise days after birth; know symptoms and follow-up — Medlatec, ACOG.
content:
## Why it still matters

Hypertension can worsen **48 hours to weeks** postpartum even if readings were normal before.

## Symptoms

Same as in pregnancy: headache, vision changes, swelling, upper abdominal pain.

## Follow-up

- Home blood pressure if advised.
- Attend postpartum visits.
- Report severe symptoms promptly.

## Breastfeeding

Many antihypertensives are compatible—ask your clinician before stopping meds.
